item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: The classic pulled pork burger with coleslaw and chipotle. (1+2+4+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Pulled tofu burger with chipotle and coleslaw. (1+2+4+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Salmon steak with French fries, topped with flash grilled peppers and onions tossed in chimichurri. Served with tartar sauce, lemon cream, aioli and ketchup. (2+3+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Grilled halloumi with French fries, topped with flash grilled peppers and onions tossed in chimichurri. Served with tartar sauce, lemon cream, aioli and ketchup. (2+6+11+15) Sprout Meal salads from Sprout are available in the restaurant all summer: fresh seasonal vegetables with a protein of your choice.
